intent.question: What are you looking for today?

time.question: How much time do you have?

access.roadside_desc: Viewable from the road — no entry needed.
access.public_desc: Free to enter and walk around.
access.private_desc: View only from public paths — do not enter.

location.not_found_desc: This spot may have been removed or the link is incorrect.
location.tip_golden_hour: Golden hour (sunrise / sunset) gives the warmest colours.
location.tip_wide_angle: Use a wide-angle lens to capture the full field.
location.tip_overcast: Overcast days reduce harsh shadows — great for detail shots.
location.tip_low_angle: Get low to the ground for a dramatic tulip-eye view.
location.etiquette_rule1: Never pick the flowers — they're a farmer's livelihood.
location.etiquette_rule2: Stay on paths and roadsides. Never walk into the fields.
location.etiquette_rule3: Don't block the road or farm access when parking.
location.etiquette_rule4: Photograph from a distance — use a zoom lens.
location.etiquette_rule5: Keep noise levels low near residential areas.
location.etiquette_rule6: Take all your rubbish with you.

saved_page.title: Saved
saved_page.empty_locs_desc: Tap the heart on any location to save it for later.
saved_page.empty_routes_desc: Save routes you want to explore and find them here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: TulipDay · Bloom season
settings.about_p1: TulipDay is your guide to the most beautiful tulip fields, photo spots, and bloom routes in the Netherlands — updated each season.
settings.about_p2: Whether you're looking for a quiet cycle through the Bollenstreek, the perfect photo composition at sunrise, or a family day out near the dunes — TulipDay helps you find it.
settings.about_p3: All locations are curated and verified by local flower lovers and photographers. Bloom status is updated weekly during the season.
settings.privacy_p1: TulipDay does not require you to create an account. A random session ID is stored locally on your device to save your favourite locations and routes.
settings.privacy_what_store_body: your session ID, saved items, onboarding preferences, and chosen language — all locally in your browser.
settings.privacy_not_store_body: your name, email, location history, or any personal data on our servers.
settings.privacy_p4: Map data is provided by Google Maps. Location coordinates are used only to show directions and are never transmitted to TulipDay.
settings.privacy_p5: To delete your data, clear your browser's local storage for this site.
settings.etiquette_intro: Tulip fields are a farmer's livelihood — please treat them with respect.
settings.etiquette_r1: Never pick or touch the flowers.
settings.etiquette_r2: Stay on roads and designated footpaths at all times. Never walk into the fields.
settings.etiquette_r3: Photograph from the roadside. Use a zoom or telephoto lens — not your feet.
settings.etiquette_r4: Don't block farm roads, driveways, or access gates when parking.
settings.etiquette_r5: Take all rubbish with you. Leave the area cleaner than you found it.
settings.etiquette_r6: Keep noise to a minimum, especially near homes and early in the morning.
settings.etiquette_r7: Keep dogs on a lead and away from the fields at all times.
settings.etiquette_r8: After rain, fields become very muddy — stay on hard surfaces to protect the soil.
settings.etiquette_r9: If a farmer asks you to leave, do so immediately and politely.
settings.etiquette_r10: Support local farmers: buy their bulbs, flowers, and products when you can.
